response.global_analysis:
1. Dialogue Match: Transcribed the fast-paced spoken dialogue of the characters accurately.
2. Visual Events: Included subtitles for the prominent visual name cards of the Hololive English -Justice- members when they are introduced on-screen.
3. Translation & Adaptation: Translated Raora's Italian phrases ('mio dio', 'porca miseria') into natural English equivalents ('my god', 'damn it') and handled the censored/bleeped swearing of Cecilia properly using '[bleep]'.
4. Timing & Pacing: Timed all subtitles tightly to match character vocal activations and avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: National Museum
subtitles.english: National Museum

subtitles.original: All right, the place is empty. Got about ten minutes before the guard's next patrol.
subtitles.english: All right, the place is empty. Got about ten minutes before the guard's next patrol.

subtitles.original: So, this is the YAGOO trophy? The Giga-Mega National Treasure.
subtitles.english: So, this is the YAGOO trophy? The Giga-Mega National Treasure.

subtitles.original: I'm going to make a fortune on this.
subtitles.english: I'm going to make a fortune on this.

subtitles.original: This is Justice. Is this an emergency?
subtitles.english: This is Justice. Is this an emergency?

subtitles.original: Help! Help! Please! Please! Please, is somebody here right now? I don't know what to do, please!
subtitles.english: Help! Help! Please! Please! Please, is somebody here right now? I don't know what to do, please!

subtitles.original: Calm down, and take a deep breath.
subtitles.english: Calm down, and take a deep breath.

subtitles.original: Can you tell me exactly what happened?
subtitles.english: Can you tell me exactly what happened?

subtitles.original: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame
subtitles.english: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame

subtitles.original: Uh, calm down, calm down...
subtitles.english: Uh, calm down, calm down...

subtitles.original: Leave it to us. Leave it to us.
subtitles.english: Leave it to us. Leave it to us.

subtitles.original: Justice is on the way right now!
subtitles.english: Justice is on the way right now!

subtitles.original: Everyone, we have a case!
subtitles.english: Everyone, we have a case!

subtitles.original: The Ultimate National Treasure has been stolen! Head to the scene immediately!
subtitles.english: The Ultimate National Treasure has been stolen! Head to the scene immediately!

subtitles.original: The Ultimate National Treasure?
subtitles.english: The Ultimate National Treasure?

subtitles.original: You mean the YAGOO statue?
subtitles.english: You mean the YAGOO statue?

subtitles.original: Who even wants that? Just let 'em keep it.
subtitles.english: Who even wants that? Just let 'em keep it.

subtitles.original: Gigi Murin
subtitles.english: Gigi Murin

subtitles.original: Gigi, that is disrespectful!
subtitles.english: Gigi, that is disrespectful!

subtitles.original: It is still the Ultimate National Treasure!
subtitles.english: It is still the Ultimate National Treasure!

subtitles.original: We're counting on you.
subtitles.english: We're counting on you.

subtitles.original: Fine, I'm on it.
subtitles.english: Fine, I'm on it.

subtitles.original: Ah, wait! Lilith!
subtitles.english: Ah, wait! Lilith!

subtitles.original: The super limited edition Sweet Kitty Plush drops in just three minutes!
subtitles.english: The super limited edition Sweet Kitty Plush drops in just three minutes!

subtitles.original: It's limited quantity, okay?
subtitles.english: It's limited quantity, okay?

subtitles.original: That... That means I absolutely have to buy it!
subtitles.english: That... That means I absolutely have to buy it!

subtitles.original: Uh, okay, so only two minutes left now...
subtitles.english: Uh, okay, so only two minutes left now...

subtitles.original: Just go already!
subtitles.english: Just go already!

subtitles.original: Ah! No! Oh, mio dio! Porca miseria! No! No!
subtitles.english: Ah! No! Oh my god! Damn it! No! No!

subtitles.original: Raora Panthera
subtitles.english: Raora Panthera

subtitles.original: Cecilia, did you get any information?
subtitles.english: Cecilia, did you get any information?

subtitles.original: Cecilia?
subtitles.english: Cecilia?

subtitles.original: Who the hell changed my keyboard to Dvorak?!
subtitles.english: Who the hell changed my keyboard to Dvorak?!

subtitles.original: Cecilia Immergreen
subtitles.english: Cecilia Immergreen

subtitles.original: Glad you love my present, Cece!
subtitles.english: Glad you love my present, Cece!

subtitles.original: This was you?!
subtitles.english: This was you?!

subtitles.original: You! You little piece of [bleep]! You absolute garbage can! When I get to you, I'm going to [bleep]!
subtitles.english: You! You little piece of [bleep]! You absolute garbage can! When I get to you, I'm going to [bleep]!

subtitles.original: Cecilia, every second counts here.
subtitles.english: Cecilia, every second counts here.

subtitles.original: I know, I know. All right.
subtitles.english: I know, I know. All right.

subtitles.original: Found a backdoor in the telescope. Cracking the encrypted protocol via brute force, enforcing a security patch overdrive...
subtitles.english: Found a backdoor in the telescope. Cracking the encrypted protocol via brute force, enforcing a security patch overdrive...

subtitles.original: In English, please!
subtitles.english: In English, please!

subtitles.original: Uh, fine. I'm in!
subtitles.english: Uh, fine. I'm in!

subtitles.original: The suspect is a woman dressed entirely in black.
subtitles.english: The suspect is a woman dressed entirely in black.

subtitles.original: Height looks around 168 cm.
subtitles.english: Height looks around 168 cm.

subtitles.original: She really likes people wearing helmets...
subtitles.english: She really likes people wearing helmets...

subtitles.original: Ah, she's fleeing north! If you move now, you can still catch her!
subtitles.english: Ah, she's fleeing north! If you move now, you can still catch her!

subtitles.original: You all heard her! Let's move out and apprehend the suspect!
subtitles.english: You all heard her! Let's move out and apprehend the suspect!

subtitles.original: For Justice!
subtitles.english: For Justice!
